---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the skill, templates, or installer didn't work
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Which part**
- [ ] `/octopus` skill / interview (loop-graph or quest arm)
- [ ] a template (`templates/…`)
- [ ] the installer (`install.sh`)
- [ ] docs / example

**To reproduce**
Steps, and the command or prompt you used.

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Environment**
Claude Code version, OS, and how you installed (curl / git clone / manual).
